initial_failures.error_message: Output contains both a non-existent-file indication and a SharePoint/API '401 Unauthorized' error. The 401 Unauthorized is an authentication/authorization issue unrelated to the expected 'file not found' error, so the non-existent-file-only expectation is not met.

error_patterns.root_cause: Tool returned a processed error containing 'SupportAlita@epam.com' contact suggestion (401 Unauthorized from SharePoint API). Pre-classified as automation_bug pending rerun. SP12 passed on rerun — classified as FLAKY (intermittent 401 from SharePoint backend).

rerun_attempts.note: SP12 passed on rerun (100% success rate, 13.7s). Classified as FLAKY — intermittent 401 from SharePoint backend.

intent_analysis.test_intent: Verify read_document returns an error when given a non-existent file path
intent_analysis.reasoning: Tool output contained 'SupportAlita@epam.com' processed error with 401 Unauthorized. Pre-classified as automation_bug pending rerun. Passed on rerun — intermittent SharePoint backend 401 response, not a consistent failure. Classified as FLAKY.

commit_info.note: Branch 'at-state-check-agents' created from main SHA 89e0f7fc. Committed milestone and output files only — no test YAML changes needed (SP12 is flaky, no fix applied).
